tutorial.slide1Body: If you have something you don't understand, post it via "+ Ask a question". Once posted, AI will try to answer first. If it's confident enough, the AI's answer is shown as-is.
tutorial.slide2Title: When AI can't, a human steps in
tutorial.slide2Body: Questions the AI can't confidently answer are automatically matched with an expert whose skill tags fit, and a human will answer. Humans fill the gaps AI leaves behind.
tutorial.slide3Body: If two experts still can't solve it, the question is published as a "hard question" to everyone. Your knowledge might save someone. Let's help the asker.

hardPage.title: Hard questions
hardPage.subtitle: Questions neither AI nor experts could answer. Can you solve them with your knowledge?

questionForm.titlePlaceholder: e.g. Hydration error when SSR-ing with Next.js
questionForm.bodyPlaceholder: Describe the problem, what you've tried, error messages, etc. (Markdown supported)
questionForm.similarQuestionsFound: Similar questions already exist — check the solved ones too
questionForm.similarStillOpen: If they still don't solve it, you can go ahead and post.
questionForm.titleTooShort: Title must be at least 5 characters
questionForm.bodyTooShort: Details must be at least 30 characters
questionForm.submitFailed: Failed to post. Please try again.

howItWorksPage.title: How it works
howItWorksPage.intro1: A service that connects specialized or personal questions AI struggles with to real human experts.
howItWorksPage.intro2: A second-opinion service that AI can't provide — exactly what's needed in the age of AI.
howItWorksPage.loginNote: You need to log in with a Google account to ask a question.
howItWorksPage.step1Description: Post the problem you want solved. AI first checks whether it fits the site's genre and won't accept it if not. You can post up to 3 questions per day.
howItWorksPage.step2Description: AI tries to answer first. If it's confident, its answer is shown as-is; otherwise, it moves to the next step.
howItWorksPage.step2Note: AI is tuned against hallucination, but its content isn't guaranteed to be accurate. Please verify important decisions yourself.
howItWorksPage.step3Description: An expert whose skills match your question's keywords gets notified. If their answer solves it, pick it as the best answer. If it doesn't, or no answer arrives within 8 hours, you can ask a second expert (escalate) or publish it as a hard question for everyone to help solve.
howItWorksPage.step4Description: If the first expert couldn't solve it, it's handed off to a second expert. It automatically moves to a hard question if there's no answer within 8 hours.
howItWorksPage.step5Description: Questions neither AI, the first expert, nor the second expert could solve are published to everyone as a "hard question". Everyone, please help with your knowledge.
howItWorksPage.step6Description: Once the asker picks a best answer from the responses, the question is marked solved. The responder's track record grows.
howItWorksPage.expertStep1: Log in with a Google account
howItWorksPage.expertStep2: Set your skill tags on My Page
howItWorksPage.expertStep4: With email notifications on, you'll be notified when matched with a question

answerForm.heading: Post an answer
answerForm.bodyPlaceholder: Share your experience and knowledge to help the asker. (30+ characters)
answerForm.tooShort: Answer must be at least 30 characters
answerForm.submitFailed: Failed to post. Please try again.

questionActions.rematchConfirm: Didn't this solve it? We'll ask the next expert. Continue?

questionActions.giveUpConfirm: Give up? It will be handed off to the next person. If you're the second expert, it becomes a hard question.

questionPage.ownerRematchHasAnswerTitle: Expert #1's answer has arrived. What would you like to do?
questionPage.ownerRematchHasAnswerBody: If it solves your problem, click "Accept as best answer". If not, you can ask the next expert or escalate to a hard question for everyone.
questionPage.ownerRematchNoAnswerBody: You can ask the next expert or escalate to a hard question.
questionPage.ownerEscalateTitle: Two experts worked on this but it wasn't solved.
questionPage.ownerEscalateBody: Escalating to a hard question publishes it to everyone to help solve it.
questionPage.ownerMatchedCWaiting: Waiting on the second expert. Depending on their answer, you can escalate to a hard question.
questionPage.ownerMatchedCWaitingNote: If the answer solves it, accept it as the best answer. It automatically escalates to a hard question if there's no answer within 8 hours.

questionPage.translationNotice: This content has been automatically translated by AI.

termsPage.title: Terms of Service
termsPage.disclaimerNotice: The Japanese version of these Terms is the authoritative text. In the event of any discrepancy between the Japanese version and a translation, the Japanese version shall prevail.
termsPage.section1Body: These Terms set out the conditions of use for the Q&A platform provided by this Service ("the Service"). By logging in with a Google account, you are deemed to have agreed to these Terms.
termsPage.section2Intro: Users must not engage in any of the following acts:
termsPage.section2Item1: Acts that violate laws or public order and morals
termsPage.section2Item2: Defamation, slander, threats, or harassment of other users
termsPage.section2Item3: Posting personal contact information such as phone numbers, email addresses, LINE IDs, or social media accounts
termsPage.section2Item4: Spam, advertising, solicitation, or posts for commercial purposes
termsPage.section2Item5: Providing specific individual advice on medical, legal, or financial matters
termsPage.section2Item6: Acts that infringe on third parties' copyrights or privacy
termsPage.section2Item7: Unauthorized access to, attacks on, or placing excessive load on the Service
termsPage.section2Item8: Any other act the operator deems inappropriate
termsPage.section3Body: Users are solely responsible for the content of questions and answers they post. The Service takes no part in the posted content and bears no responsibility for its accuracy, legality, or harmfulness. The operator bears no responsibility for any problems or damages arising from posted content. Posted content may be used for operating and improving the Service.
termsPage.section4Body: The Service is provided "as is." We make no guarantee whatsoever regarding the accuracy, usefulness, or completeness of the information or answers obtained through the Service. The operator bears no responsibility for any damages arising from the use or inability to use the Service. Answers on the Service are for reference only and should not be used for anything beyond that. In particular, always follow the judgment of a qualified professional for medical, legal, financial, or investment decisions.
termsPage.section5Title: Article 5 (Changes to or Suspension of the Service)
termsPage.section5Body: The operator may change, suspend, or terminate the content of the Service without prior notice. The operator bears no responsibility for any damages to users resulting from this.
termsPage.section6Body: We may suspend or delete the account of a user who violates these Terms without prior notice. There is no obligation to explain or compensate the user in connection with such suspension or deletion.
termsPage.section7Body: These Terms may be changed without prior notice. If you continue to use the Service after a change, you are deemed to have agreed to the revised Terms.

privacyPage.title: Privacy Policy
privacyPage.disclaimerNotice: The Japanese version of this Policy is the authoritative text. In the event of any discrepancy between the Japanese version and a translation, the Japanese version shall prevail.
privacyPage.section1Intro: The Service collects the following information:
privacyPage.section1Item1: Email address, display name, and profile image URL provided by your Google account
privacyPage.section1Item2: Content of questions and answers you post
privacyPage.section1Item3: Skill tags, display name, and availability status set in your profile
privacyPage.section1Outro: We do not collect personally identifiable information such as name, address, or phone number.
privacyPage.section2Item1: Providing, operating, and improving the Service
privacyPage.section3Body: We use the following external services, and each company's privacy policy applies. Please use the Service only if you agree to its use, including data transmission to these services:
privacyPage.section3Item2: Groq (AI answer generation — question content is processed)
privacyPage.section3Outro: We do not provide personal information to any third party other than those listed above.
privacyPage.section4Body: Data is stored in a Supabase database. If you wish to delete your account, please contact us via the contact form. We will accommodate such requests to the extent possible.
privacyPage.section5Body: We use cookies to maintain login state. If cookies are disabled, the login feature may not work properly.
privacyPage.section6Body: The Service strives to manage collected information securely, but does not guarantee complete security. The operator bears no responsibility for damages arising from information leaks or similar incidents.
privacyPage.section7Body: This Policy may be changed without prior notice. If you continue to use the Service after a change, you are deemed to have agreed to the revised Policy.
privacyPage.section8ContactPrefix: For questions about privacy or requests for deletion, please contact us via the
